---
title: "Publications"
---

## Preprints

**Habilis-β: A Fast-Motion and Long-Lasting On-Device Vision-Language-Action Model**
Kang, J., Park, T., An, J., **Kimm, S. M.**, et al. (2026). *arXiv:2602.18813*.
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.18813)

An on-device vision–language–action (VLA) model for fast-motion, long-duration real-world robot deployment. In 1-hour continuous-run evaluations it achieves strong performance under the PRP metrics, compared with π₀.₅ in both simulation and the real world. *(Tommoro Robotics; cs.RO / cs.LG.)*

## Theses

**Ionospheric Outflow: From Fundamental Theory to Modern Modeling Frameworks**
**Kimm, S. M.** (2025). *M.S. Thesis, University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign* (Advisor: Raluca Ilie).
[IDEALS](https://hdl.handle.net/2142/129196)

My M.S. thesis examines plasma exchange between Earth and space — how charged particles escape from the ionosphere — covering theoretical foundations, modeling approaches from classical to contemporary frameworks, and mechanisms such as ambipolar electric fields and wave–particle interactions.
